item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarterly earnings season has brought a mixed bag of results across market capitalisation segments, with mid and small caps showing marked improvement in profitability and positive results, while large caps continue to face challenges. A total of 61 companies have declared their results, revealing sectoral trends and earnings momentum that investors should closely monitor. Time: Apr 18 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Network 18 Media Q4 FY26: Losses Deepen Despite Revenue Recovery
item.description: Network 18 Media & Investments Ltd. reported a consolidated net loss of ₹30.52 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a significant deterioration from the previous quarter's loss of ₹5.98 crores. Despite net sales climbing to ₹615.78 crores—the highest quarterly figure in recent periods—the media and entertainment company continues to grapple with profitability challenges that have plagued its performance throughout the fiscal year. The stock, currently trading at ₹36.33 with a market capitalisation of ₹5,510 crores, has declined 18.96% over the past year, significantly underperforming both the Sensex and its sector peers. Time: Apr 18 2026 08:30 PM IST

item.title: Are Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Bajaj Consumer Care Ltd's latest results are positive, showing a 30.41% increase in net sales and a 105.29% rise in net profit, alongside improved operating margins and a solid balance sheet with no long-term debt, indicating strong operational performance and financial health. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are National Standard (India) Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: National Standard (India) Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing zero revenue for Q4 FY26 and a significant drop in net profit, indicating severe operational challenges and a reliance on non-operating income. The company's financial metrics suggest inefficiencies and an overvaluation relative to its performance. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Sanathnagar Enterprises Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sanathnagar Enterprises Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a net profit of ₹0.21 crores driven by non-operational income, with no sales revenue and a negative book value, indicating significant financial challenges and operational dormancy. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Jio Financial Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Jio Financial Services Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 106.49% year-on-year, but a 13.88% decline in net profit raises concerns about profitability and operational efficiency. The company needs to address these challenges despite its impressive sales performance. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Madhya Bharat Agro Products Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Madhya Bharat Agro Products Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in net profit and revenue, but sequential declines and operational challenges raise concerns about sustainability. Investors should monitor future performance closely due to these mixed signals. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Eco Hotels and Resorts Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Eco Hotels and Resorts Ltd's latest results show impressive revenue growth of 1,800% to ₹2.47 crores, but this is overshadowed by a significant net loss of ₹5.50 crores and severe operational inefficiencies, indicating a challenging financial outlook. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Mastek Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Mastek Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a net profit of ₹106.15 crores, up 30.94% year-on-year, but down 2.03% from the previous quarter. Revenue growth is slowing, raising concerns about future performance despite achieving a record quarterly profit. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are CRISIL Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: CRISIL Ltd.'s latest Q4 FY26 results show strong year-on-year growth in revenue and net profit, with net profit up 45.93% and revenue up 30.06%. However, there were sequential declines in both revenue and profit, indicating some short-term challenges despite overall financial stability and strong capital efficiency. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Are Bridge Securities Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Bridge Securities Ltd's latest results for March 2026 show a significant recovery in profitability and sales, with net sales increasing by 90.48% and net profit rising by 18.18%. However, challenges remain, including a negative five-year sales growth rate and a lack of institutional holdings, indicating concerns about long-term sustainability. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Hathway Cable Q4 FY26: Profit Plunge Amid Margin Erosion Raises Red Flags
item.description: Hathway Cable & Datacom Ltd., India's leading fixed-line internet service provider and cable television operator, reported a disappointing fourth quarter for FY26, with consolidated net profit plummeting 67.33% year-on-year to ₹11.33 crores from ₹34.68 crores in Q4 FY25. The Reliance Group-owned company, with a market capitalisation of ₹2,039 crores, saw its stock trade at ₹11.62 on April 17, 2026, reflecting a modest 1.22% gain on the day but remaining under pressure with a year-to-date decline of 6.74%. Time: Apr 18 2026 07:00 PM IST

item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has delivered a notable improvement in corporate profitability, with 53.0% of the 60 companies reporting positive results, marking a steady rise from the previous quarters. Mid and small cap stocks led the charge with higher proportions of positive outcomes, while large caps showed more modest gains. This article analyses the key trends, sectoral performances, and standout companies shaping the current earnings landscape. Time: Apr 18 2026 06:00 PM IST

item.title: DLF Ltd. Gains 5.65%: 2 Key Factors Driving This Week’s Momentum
item.description: DLF Ltd delivered a strong performance this week, rising 5.65% from Rs.569.60 to Rs.601.80, comfortably outpacing the Sensex’s 2.33% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was supported by robust intraday momentum midweek and a subtle shift in technical momentum towards a mildly bearish stance by week’s end, reflecting a complex but cautiously optimistic market sentiment. Time: Apr 18 2026 05:09 PM IST

item.title: Astral Ltd’s 1.09% Weekly Decline Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Derivatives Surge
item.description: Astral Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 13 to 17 April 2026, closing with a 1.09% decline to Rs.1,612.85 despite a strong Sensex rally of 2.33%. The stock’s price movements were marked by significant derivatives market activity, including sharp surges in open interest, contrasting with mixed technical signals and sectoral pressures. This review analyses the key events shaping Astral’s performance and the implications for investors navigating this complex landscape. Time: Apr 18 2026 05:09 PM IST
